title: Iron Ore Gains As China Further Supports Property Market
section_path: Iron Ore Gains As China Further Supports Property Market
section_path_text: Iron Ore Gains As China Further Supports Property Market
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Signs of strong demand boosted sentiment across commodity markets. This was aided by the slight cooling of inflation, which eased concerns of more aggressive rate hikes and weaker economic activity. Crude oil gained as hopes of stronger demand rose.
